oidcServiceGlobalExtraScopes.documentation: Global extra scopes and claims applied to all OIDC relying parties. Key: scope name, Value: space-separated claim names.

oidcServiceGlobalClaimMapping.documentation: Fallback mapping for global scope claims not declared in an RP's Exported Attributes. Key: claim name, Value: session attribute (optionally followed by ;type;array, same syntax as oidcRPMetaDataExportedVars). If a claim used in oidcServiceGlobalExtraScopes is missing from an RP's Exported Attributes, this mapping is consulted; if still not found, the claim name itself is used as the session attribute.
